ogTitle: Daceyville vs Dairy Flat: Climate Safety

heading: Daceyville vs Dairy Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Daceyville, New South Wales and Dairy Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dairy Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Daceyville (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Daceyville or Dairy Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Daceyville has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Dairy Flat scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Daceyville scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Dairy Flat scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Daceyville or Dairy Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dairy Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
